name: Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Exterior Wall Paint
file: Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Exterior Wall Paint.webp
src: /Regular/exterior/Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Exterior Wall Paint.webp
leadtext: Meitu’s eco-friendly high glossy exterior wall paint is specially formulated to provide a durable, high-shine finish that enhances the look of any building exterior. Designed for long-lasting performance, this paint offers excellent resistance against weathering, UV rays, and pollution, ensuring the walls remain vibrant over time. Its eco-friendly formulation reduces harmful emissions and odors, making it safe for the environment and nearby occupants. Ideal for modern and elegant facades, this paint delivers a striking glossy appearance while protecting your walls from harsh outdoor conditions.
features: High Shining and ultra smooth finish

name: Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Natural Exterior Wall Paints
file: Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Natural Exterior Wall Paints.webp
src: /Regular/exterior/Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Natural Exterior Wall Paints.webp
leadtext: It offers a natural, high-gloss aesthetic for exterior walls, blending a luminous finish with gentle environmental performance. It’s crafted to deliver a refined while retaining the eco-friendly, low-smell properties. It combines strong durability with a decorative sheen that helps accentuate architectural style

name: Meitu Environmentally Constant Color Exterior Paint
file: Meitu Environmentally Constant Color Exterior Paint.webp
leadtext: This paint is formulated to deliver consistent, long-lasting colour that retains its shade over time even under sunlight and weather exposure. It’s also eco friendly with low odour, durable, and cleanable. Its smooth, stable finish helps maintain a uniform look across large exterior surfaces, reducing frequent repainting and colour fading.

name: Meitu Eco-Friendly Dark Color Interior and Exterior Wall Paint
file: Meitu Eco-Friendly Dark Color Interior and Exterior Wall Paint.webp
src: /Regular/exterior/Meitu Eco-Friendly Dark Color Interior and Exterior Wall Paint.webp
leadtext: Meitu Eco-friendly dark colour paint (dark base) is a speciality paint formulated to deliver deep, rich, and saturated dark tones while being gentle on the environment and indoor air quality. The “dark base” means the paint is specifically designed as a foundation for darker shades (like charcoals, deep blues, forest greens, dark browns, and black-based hues), providing excellent coverage and consistent depth of colour with fewer coats.
features: Low VOC / Safe for Air Quality

name: Meitu Environmentally Friendly Natural Exterior Wall Paint
file: Meitu Environmentally Friendly Natural Exterior Wall Paint.webp
src: /Regular/exterior/Meitu Environmentally Friendly Natural Exterior Wall Paint.webp
leadtext: A natural finish, environment friendly exterior paint with an emphasis on environmentally safe ingredients and smooth texture. Unlike the high glossy versions, this one leans toward a natural, softer appearance on outdoor walls while still being durable, easy to clean, and free from strong fumes — suitable for traditional and contemporary designs alike.

name: Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Exterior Wall Paint Ceiling White
file: Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Exterior Wall Paint Ceiling White.webp
src: /Regular/exterior/Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Exterior Wall Paint Ceiling White.webp
leadtext: Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Ceiling White Paint is an environmentally conscious exterior ceiling paint designed to give ceilings a bright, shiny, high-gloss finish that enhances the look of your room. This paint is formulated with eco-friendly ingredients and minimal smell, making it safer and more comfortable to use in living spaces like living rooms, bedrooms, and hallways. It provides a reflective white surface that helps bounce light around the room, making spaces feel more open and luminous.
